original_image_tags: A blank, aged, off-white or light manila document page. It shows some light staining and a few small dark specks, particularly in the lower-left area. The only distinct feature is a single handwritten annotation in blue ink, oriented vertically in the upper-left quadrant of the page. The text appears to be a name and a date.

elements.description: A single handwritten annotation in blue ink located in the upper left quadrant. The cursive text reads 'Copy 10-10-57'.

judge.reason: Description A describes a largely blank page with minor stains and an unreadable vertical annotation, while Description B claims the specific quoted text 'Copy 10-10-57', indicating a direct contradiction on the legible content of the image.
